title: palicourea obtusata
intro: Palicourea obtusata, also known as the "Palo de Acay" or "Palo de Acayhuasi", is a plant species native to the Andes region in South America, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Palicourea obtusata include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. Palicourea obtusata is often prepared as a tea or infusion, or in some cases, as a tincture or extract, to harness its medicinal properties.
